user.title: Configure PC User Statistics
user.description: Enter InfluxDB details to track power consumption, game time, and costs for the gaming PC.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to InfluxDB. Check host, port, and credentials.
error.invalid_config: Invalid configuration. Please check all fields.

init.title: Configure Users
init.description:
Edit which users are tracked and how sensor states map to user IDs.

**Tracked users**: comma-separated list, e.g. `flemming, lukas, sebastian`

**User mappings**: comma-separated key=value pairs, e.g. `konge=flemming, lukas=lukas, sebas=sebastian`

error.no_users: At least one tracked user is required.
error.mapping_user_not_tracked: All mapped user IDs must exist in the tracked users list.

influxdb_unreachable.title: InfluxDB is unreachable
influxdb_unreachable.description:
PC User Statistics has failed to write data to InfluxDB {consecutive_failures} times in a row. Statistics data may be lost.

Check that InfluxDB is running and accessible, then reload the integration.

**Settings → Devices & Services → PC User Statistics → ⋮ → Reload**

If credentials have changed, use **Reconfigure** instead.
